title: Danmu 10 Pack Glass Bottles, 3.3oz Small Glass Bottles,Glass Bottles with Cork,Wine Bottles,Sauce Bottles,Shrink Capsules Included,100ml Glass Bottles for Decorations, Party Favors
description:
About this item
PACKAGE INCLUDES - 10 Pack 3.3oz / 100ml glass bottle with lid, 10 x heat shrink capsule,1 x funnel.
QUALITY THICK GLASS - Danmu glass bottles are made of lead free glass. Elegant style, heavyduty,thick glass bottom, anti-slip and stand stably. Classic aluminium T-Top synthetic cork ensures good sealing, making these glass bottles leak-proof.
SHRINK CAPSULES - Want to share your homemade vanilla extract, hot sauce, juice with your friends or families? Get our Danmu 10 pack 3.3oz empty glass bottles. The included heat shrink capsules make your homemade drinks look more professional.
VERSATILE USAGE - They are more than wine bottles, hot sauce bottles,liquor bottles, whiskey bottle,oil dispensing bottles. These glass bottles can also be used for syrup,kombucha,beer,vanilla extract,coquito,mead,limoncello storage. Must have for wedding,housewarming,birthday,Christmas,Valentine,or any other parties
Should anything we can do for you, please feel to email us. We will reply in 24 hours!
› See more product details
reviews_5s: These little bottles were the perfect size for our homemade vanilla! With the vanilla bean in it along with the shrink wrapped top, they look so professional! The glass is nice and thick. All the corks fit easily and the little funnel made it mess free! I will definitely buy these again next year!I'm using for my homemade ginger syrup. The bottles look and feel lux. Cork lid fits perfectly. The little funnel included was a nice touch, but I used a sturdier plastic one for easier filling. Happy with this purchase.We have a group who exchange bourbon with each other. I received some in mason jars and let them sit too long and the metal lid changed the flavor of the bourbon. I went looking for a bottle with a stopper and found these and they are PERFECT! The size, the funnel and the stoppers were exactly what I was looking for. I purchased some cute chalk board labels that fit great. I liked them so much I began pouring my near empty bottles into these to free up room on my bar. Totally recommend!One arrived broken.My friends got the gift that I put some perilla oil thought that I bought the oil bottles from the store.Well made and easy to use.Very nice set and it makes the product look professional. Eash to seal and the top does stop the fluids from pouring out the top. The top shrinks great. Nice with a label on it. I did buy some clear shrink wrap for the top and bottle and then put the gold foil on top of this. Absolutely no leaks and it shipped across the country via air.Wrapped, packaged securely for shipping. Beautiful bottles!! My vanilla extract was beautiful in these bottles. Heat shrink seal worked perfectly and extras given in case of mistake! Will definitely order again for Christmas gift givingLove these!!Will but again, that should say it all.
